name: Stuffed Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a thin long-bladed paring knife, cut the core out from the cabbage and discard it.
2. Loosen the leaves and remove 12 large outer leaves.
3. Steam or blanch the leaves until they are flexible.
4. Place the rib side up and trim the heavy center rib.
5. Mix ground beef, rice, onion, egg, and salt and pepper to taste in a bowl.
6. Place 1 tablespoon of the mixture on each leaf.
7. Roll the cabbage tightly towards the tips, tucking the sides in.
8. Place the rolls in a deep pot.
9. Add beef broth or water to cover completely.
10. Add onion with cloves to the pot along with bay leaf, lemon juice, brown sugar, and tomato puree.
11. Cover and simmer slowly for 1 hour.
12. Add raisins and ginger snaps.
13. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
14. Stir the sauce to blend it.
15. Optional: Arrange cabbage in a single layer in a flat baking pan, about 3-4 inches deep.
16. Season the sauce with salt and pepper and pour over the cabbage.
17. Bake at 375°F until the sauce is thick and the rolls are brown.
